return(function(v,A,f,d,E,m,K,M,X,U,j,b,x,g,W,k,Q,h,O,H,r,z,s)z,r,j,M,Q,x,g,O,U,W,H,h,k,s,X,b=function(v,q)local A=M(q)local f=function(f,d)return g(v,{f,d},q,A)end return f end,function(v,q)local A=M(q)local f=function(f,d,E,m,K,H)return g(v,{f,d,E;m;K,H},q,A)end return f end,function(v)local q,g=221362+-221361,v[-980801+980802]while g do W[g],q=W[g]-(884526-884525),(-275326-(-275327))+q if
